description: Create a Microsoft Word document for an IT Incident Management Process based on the ITIL framework. The document must include the title 'IT Incident Management Process' (Heading 1), the subtitle 'Standard Operating Procedure — ITIL Framework' (Heading 2), and an introduction paragraph: 'This document outlines the five-stage incident management process based on the ITIL framework. The process ensures that IT service disruptions are handled efficiently to restore normal operations as quickly as possible.' Include a SmartArt process diagram with five steps labeled: 'Identify', 'Log', 'Diagnose', 'Resolve', and 'Close'. Below the diagram, include a numbered list describing the steps: 'Identify — Detect and report the incident through monitoring tools or user reports.', 'Log — Record incident details including time, impact, and affected services.', 'Diagnose — Investigate root cause through analysis and escalation if needed.', 'Resolve — Implement a fix or workaround to restore the affected service.', and 'Close — Confirm resolution with the user and close the incident record.' Save the document to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\incident_management_process.docx.
